name: Loom
price_basis: Business at $18 per user per month on monthly billing; free Starter caps at 25 videos of 5 minutes, checked 2026-07
verdict_reason: TRIM: free Loom records 25 videos. Zo hosts the archive so the cap never bites. Drop the $18 seat.
what_zo_builds: A video archive that makes the free plan enough: Zo pulls your existing Looms, stores them in your workspace, transcribes every video so old walkthroughs are searchable, and serves a /videos route with share links and view counts. New quick takes still record in free Loom; when you near the 25-video cap, the oldest move to your archive, so the meter never charges you rent.
dont_kill_if: Your team lives in Loom with SSO, engagement analytics, and video CTAs wired into sales workflows. One person downgrading does not move a team plan anyway.
build_brief: Goal: drop my Loom Business seat to the free plan without losing a single video. Download my full Loom library, store it under /videos with dates and titles, and transcribe everything so old recordings are searchable. Build a share route with clean URLs and a view counter. Set an automation that watches the free plan's 25-video cap and archives the oldest recordings before it bites. Done when every old link has a working replacement and the seat is downgraded to free.
